title: Eggs better food
description: This mod enhances the vanilla Minecraft experience by expanding the food recipes. It is designed to maintain the classic vanilla feel while introducing additional variety to the existing food options.
body:
## Egg's better food ##


This mod enhances the Minecraft food experience by expanding the food recipes with new items like "Cooked Beetroot" and "Cured Rotten Flesh." It is designed to maintain the classic vanilla feel while introducing additional variety to the existing food options. The mod also includes corresponding recipe advancements for each new item.

Your ideas for further improvements are welcome! Please share them in the github Discussions tab.

Updates will be released soon, with priority given to including versions 1.19 and 1.16. Enjoy exploring the new food options and have fun!

Git: https://github.com/EggDogue/Eggs-Better-Food

## Display ##

![Campfire Cooking!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d715861b3764e226df9f07a8cd7f43c016d3d29.png)
